creator: lab+bsd@thinkum.space
text:
I'll try to provide an updated patch soon. In some initial Q/A about the first diff I'd provided, this morning:

With the port updated with the patch as provided,  when building the port directly under /usr/ports I was able to build up to the point of 'make build'. It fails in check-plist

With the same updated port, but when building under poudriere, it failed in the 'configure' stage on a syntax error in the configure script. I'm not sure how that's not turning up during the direct build under /usr/ports, will take a look at that and for the plist update
